verses.text: In Tiberius's fifteenth year the word comes to John, who preaches 'the baptism of repentance.' The herald's hour. God's word comes to His chosen forerunner.
In Tiberius's fifteenth year the word comes to John, who preaches 'the baptism of repentance.' The herald's hour. God's word comes to His chosen forerunner.
In Tiberius's fifteenth year the word comes to John, who preaches 'the baptism of repentance.' The herald's hour. God's word comes to His chosen forerunner.
As Isaiah wrote, the voice cries, 'Prepare ye the way'; 'all flesh shall see the salvation of God.' Wide salvation. The gospel is for every nation, not Israel only.
As Isaiah wrote, the voice cries, 'Prepare ye the way'; 'all flesh shall see the salvation of God.' Wide salvation. The gospel is for every nation, not Israel only.
As Isaiah wrote, the voice cries, 'Prepare ye the way'; 'all flesh shall see the salvation of God.' Wide salvation. The gospel is for every nation, not Israel only.
'O generation of vipers,' bring forth fruit; 'the axe is laid unto the root.' No empty profession. Repentance must show itself in changed lives.
'O generation of vipers,' bring forth fruit; 'the axe is laid unto the root.' No empty profession. Repentance must show itself in changed lives.
'O generation of vipers,' bring forth fruit; 'the axe is laid unto the root.' No empty profession. Repentance must show itself in changed lives.
Asked what to do, he bids the people share, the publicans be honest, the soldiers content. Practical fruit. True repentance reforms the daily life and work.
Asked what to do, he bids the people share, the publicans be honest, the soldiers content. Practical fruit. True repentance reforms the daily life and work.
Asked what to do, he bids the people share, the publicans be honest, the soldiers content. Practical fruit. True repentance reforms the daily life and work.
Asked what to do, he bids the people share, the publicans be honest, the soldiers content. Practical fruit. True repentance reforms the daily life and work.
Asked what to do, he bids the people share, the publicans be honest, the soldiers content. Practical fruit. True repentance reforms the daily life and work.
Men wonder if he be the Christ; one mightier comes, baptizing with 'the Holy Ghost and with fire.' Pointing beyond. John gladly yields the place to Christ.
Men wonder if he be the Christ; one mightier comes, baptizing with 'the Holy Ghost and with fire.' Pointing beyond. John gladly yields the place to Christ.
Men wonder if he be the Christ; one mightier comes, baptizing with 'the Holy Ghost and with fire.' Pointing beyond. John gladly yields the place to Christ.
He exhorts the people, but Herod, reproved for his sin, shuts John in prison. Costly faithfulness. To rebuke a king's sin may bring a prison.
He exhorts the people, but Herod, reproved for his sin, shuts John in prison. Costly faithfulness. To rebuke a king's sin may bring a prison.
He exhorts the people, but Herod, reproved for his sin, shuts John in prison. Costly faithfulness. To rebuke a king's sin may bring a prison.
Jesus baptized and praying, the heaven opens, the Spirit descends, 'Thou art my beloved Son.' Heaven's witness. The Father owns His Son at His baptism.
Jesus baptized and praying, the heaven opens, the Spirit descends, 'Thou art my beloved Son.' Heaven's witness. The Father owns His Son at His baptism.

Jesus, about thirty, begins His work; His line is traced through David and Abraham back to 'Adam... the son of God.' True man. His ancestry reaches to the first man, binding Him to the whole human race He came to save.
